title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXIX. Natural History.
content:
Higglepy Piggleby,
            My black hen,
        She lays eggs
            For gentlemen;
        Sometimes nine,
            And sometimes ten,
        Higglepy Piggleby,
            My black hen!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXIX. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
